title: Cleanspark Inc (CLSK) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Growth
text: Cleanspark delivered exceptional financial results for fiscal year 2024, demonstrating significant growth across key operational metrics. The bitcoin mining company achieved record revenue and strategic growth while navigating operational challenges. Revenue reached $378.9 million, representing 125% growth year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA climbed to $245.8 million, marking an impressive 882% increase. Gross profit expanded 185% to $213.5 million. However, the company reported a net loss of $145.8 million, primarily due to a non-cash impairment charge of $197 million. Bitcoin production: approximately 7,100 BTC during fiscal 2024. Power costs: $0.046 per kilowatt hour (improved from $0.048). Mining cost: $21,400 per bitcoin for wholly-owned facilities. Bitcoin holdings: Nearly 10,000 BTC (approximately $1 billion valuation). Cash position: $121 million as of September 30. Hash rate: 33.5 Exahash/second, targeting 37 by year-end. Hurricane Helene disrupted operations, causing a revenue loss of approximately $1 million per day during the outage. Mining costs surged to $36,250 per bitcoin in Q4. Potential tariff risks on ASIC miners pose future cost concerns. CEO Zachary Bradford expressed confidence in expanded market opportunities and emphasized that larger miners will continue to access the best capital and opportunities in 2025.
